return(function(a,T,Q,A,Y,I,J,R,E,w,v,i,r,D,Z,q,B,U,t,g,K)E,K,U,g,w,Z,q,t,v,R,D,B,r,i=-302012+302012,function(a)local W,w=275098+-275097,a[-636649+636650]while w do
